projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: iOS: exit-65 archive fix pushed (commit e27ba73, build 1.11.3+4) — rive_native native library now built on CI before the archive; re-run pending. Web: already live at grdnapp.com. Home-screen redesign delivered — full analysis, an ideal-home-screen spec (one job: start a focus session against today's top task; one bright button; the garden fills the dead space), and a copy-paste Google Stitch prompt. Spec saved to docs/homescreen-redesign.md.
projects.nextStep: Re-run the GRDN Xcode Cloud build to confirm the iOS fix. Home-screen: run the Stitch prompt, pick a design, then Claude can build the redesigned home screen.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: Measurement redesign shipped — v1.8.1 (commit 63896bc). Length is now a real measurement, not a guess: for the top-down shot the user pushes the heel and the paper's short edge both flat against a wall, so the paper edge is an exact heel datum (the wall removes the eyeballing). The scan outputs the full set — length, toe profile, ball/midfoot/heel widths; heel width from the heel photo with the paper in frame. Typecheck clean; not yet tested on a real photo.
projects.nextStep: Take a test scan with the wall method — heel and paper's short edge both flat against a wall for the top-down shot, whole paper in frame for the heel shot — and check the numbers.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: App live end-to-end. Library site, waitlist page, App Store screenshot set shipped; iPad responsive layouts added (65e5c79). Now improving the daily 'Today' reading: making it genuinely vary day-to-day (the gate theme holds ~5-6 days as the Sun crosses it, so 'Today's Focus' was repeating) and adding a real time-range to the Moon section.
projects.nextStep: Daily-reading improvement in progress. Jeremy is mid App Store submission — iPhone + iPad screenshots both delivered (iPad framed at 2064x2752). Finish it: the walked-through blockers (Copyright, Content Rights, Privacy Policy URL, data questionnaire), upload the screenshots, and submit. Ideally submit a fresh build that includes the iPad layouts.

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: On hold by your decision. This is the customer-facing 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app (front-end built; Firebase + Stripe backend built and pushed). Paused to focus on the separate AI Voice Agent — the sales-agent MVP in the primal-agent repo. Distinct project from this one.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Feature-complete in mock mode — foundation, dashboard, outbound campaign engine, and an interactive voice test harness all built and verified: typecheck clean, 42/42 tests pass, boots with no API keys. Try it now with 'npm run harness'. Everything buildable without external services is done. Repo: giddyuptiger/primal-agent (commit 96ded86).
projects.nextStep: Two things, both yours: (1) provisioning — Twilio + A2P 10DLC, Deepgram, TTS, Supabase, Resend, Claude key, a host (see docs/PROVISIONING.md; start the A2P registration first, it's the slowest); (2) decide the gym platform (Mindbody/F45) so the real booking adapter can be built.
